metadata.description: Reusable refactoring, re-architecture, and modernization skills for Claude Code (any language)

plugins.name: refactor-skill
plugins.description: Two skills: endpoint-rearchitect — language-agnostic endpoint re-architecture with a universal tracer (Java/Kotlin, JS/TS, Python, Go, C#, Ruby, PHP; 20+ frameworks), behavior contracts, and characterization-test pinning; java-modernization — Java 8/11/17 to 21, Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x, javax-to-jakarta with a searchable knowledge base. Commands: /rearchitect-endpoint, /java-modernization, /java-endpoint. Agents: endpoint-tracer, behavior-guardian, java-modernizer. Business logic is never changed.
